response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for '天ノ弱' (Amanojaku). I transcribed and translated the spoken Japanese in the subway segment and the talk segment with the guest. On-screen song titles and credits for both '天ノ弱' and '気まぐれメルシィ' (Kimagure Mercy) have been included as secondary priority. I have discarded unused lyrics for '気まぐれメルシィ' as the video segment ends shortly after its introduction. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio and follow the splitting rule for mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: あー、やばい
subtitles.english: Ah, oh no...

subtitles.original: もっと生きてんだよ
subtitles.english: I want to live more!

subtitles.original: おい、最後までちゃんと見るって言って
subtitles.english: Hey, say you'll watch until the end.

subtitles.original: 配信最後までちゃんと見るって言って
subtitles.english: Say you'll watch the stream until the end!

subtitles.original: あー！
subtitles.english: Ahhh!

subtitles.original: 僕がずっと前から思ってる事を話そうか
subtitles.english: Shall I tell you what I've been thinking for a long time?

subtitles.original: 友達に戻れたらこれ以上はもう望まないさ
subtitles.english: If I can be your friend once again, I won't ask for more than this.

subtitles.original: 君がそれでいいなら僕だってそれで構わないさ
subtitles.english: If you are fine with that, I am fine with that too.

subtitles.original: 嘘つきの僕が吐いた
subtitles.english: A love song of 'contrary words'...

subtitles.original: はんたいことばの愛のうた
subtitles.english: that I, the liar, have spat out.

subtitles.original:
天ノ弱
作詞・作曲: 164
subtitles.english:
Amanojaku
Lyrics & Composition: 164

subtitles.original: 今日はこっちの地方は
subtitles.english: Today, in this region,

subtitles.original: どしゃぶりの晴天でした
subtitles.english: it was a pouring sunshine.

subtitles.original: 昨日もずっと暇で
subtitles.english: Yesterday too, I was free all day,

subtitles.original: 一日満喫してました
subtitles.english: and I enjoyed the whole day.

subtitles.original: 別に君のことなんて 考えてなんかいないさ
subtitles.english: I don't think about you at all,

subtitles.original: 嫌だ、ちょっと本当は 考えてたかもなんて
subtitles.english: No, wait... maybe I was actually thinking about you.

subtitles.original: めりごーらんどみたいに 回る
subtitles.english: It's spinning like a merry-go-round.

subtitles.original: 僕の頭の中が 回る
subtitles.english: My head is spinning around.

subtitles.original: ぐるぐるさ
subtitles.english: Around and around.

subtitles.original: このろーてーから こぼれそうなほど
subtitles.english: From this rotation, as if about to overflow,

subtitles.original: 君にもらった愛のその溢れるほど
subtitles.english: even more than the overflowing love you gave me,

subtitles.original: どこに捨てようか
subtitles.english: where should I throw it all away?

subtitles.original: 限りのある僕のこの心で
subtitles.english: In this heart of mine, with its limited capacity...

subtitles.original: パンクしちゃうから
subtitles.english: it's about to burst.

subtitles.original: いらないよ
subtitles.english: I don't need it.

subtitles.original: 僕がずっと前から思ってる事を話そうか
subtitles.english: Shall I tell you what I've been thinking for a long time?

subtitles.original: 姿は見えないのに 言葉だけ見えちゃってるんだ
subtitles.english: Though I can't see your form, I can only see your words.

subtitles.original: 僕が知らないことが あるだけで気が狂いそうだ
subtitles.english: Just knowing there are things I don't know drives me crazy.

subtitles.original: ぶら下がった感情が 綺麗なのか汚いのか
subtitles.english: Whether these dangling emotions are beautiful or dirty,

subtitles.original: 僕には まだわからない
subtitles.english: I still don't know.

subtitles.original: 捨てるあてもないんだ
subtitles.english: And I have no place to throw them away.

subtitles.original: 言葉の裏の裏が 見えるまで待つからさ
subtitles.english: I'll wait until I can see the back of the back of the words.

subtitles.original: 真っ暗じゃないか
subtitles.english: Isn't it pitch black?

subtitles.original: それでいいじゃないか
subtitles.english: Well, isn't that just fine?

subtitles.original: 進む君と 止まった僕の
subtitles.english: With you moving forward and me stopped,

subtitles.original: 縮まらない隙間を 何で埋めよう
subtitles.english: how should I fill the gap that won't close?

subtitles.original: まだ素直に 言葉にできない僕は
subtitles.english: I, who still can't put it into honest words,

subtitles.original: てっせいのよわむし
subtitles.english: am a coward made of iron.

subtitles.original: このろーてーから こぼれそうなほど
subtitles.english: From this rotation, as if about to overflow,

subtitles.original: 君にもらった愛を 誰に譲ろう
subtitles.english: the love I received from you, who should I give it to?

subtitles.original: そんな所にも あてがあるわけないから
subtitles.english: Because there's no way I have anyone for that.

subtitles.original: まだ、まだ待つよ
subtitles.english: I'll wait, wait still.

subtitles.original: もういいかい
subtitles.english: Are you ready yet?

subtitles.original: のりあきさんが歌ってるｗ
subtitles.english: Noriaki-san is singing! lol

気まぐれメルシィ

作曲: 八王子P
